actions.script: var domainList='${domains}'.split(',').map(function(d){return d.trim()}).filter(function(d){return d.length>0}); var allResults=[]; async function extractEntityData(entities,result){for(var j=0;j<entities.length;j++){var ent=entities[j]; if(ent.roles&&ent.roles.indexOf('registrar')!==-1){var vcard=ent.vcardArray&&ent.vcardArray[1]?ent.vcardArray[1]:[]; for(var k=0;k<vcard.length;k++){if(vcard[k][0]==='fn')result.registrar=vcard[k][3];} result.registrar_iana_id=ent.publicIds&&ent.publicIds[0]?ent.publicIds[0].identifier:null;} if(ent.roles&&ent.roles.indexOf('registrant')!==-1){var rvcard=ent.vcardArray&&ent.vcardArray[1]?ent.vcardArray[1]:[]; for(var m=0;m<rvcard.length;m++){if(rvcard[m][0]==='fn')result.registrant_name=rvcard[m][3];if(rvcard[m][0]==='org')result.registrant_org=rvcard[m][3];if(rvcard[m][0]==='email')result.registrant_email=rvcard[m][3];if(rvcard[m][0]==='adr'){var addr=rvcard[m][3];if(Array.isArray(addr)){result.registrant_country=addr[6]||null;result.registrant_city=addr[3]||null;result.registrant_state=addr[4]||null;}}if(rvcard[m][0]==='tel')result.registrant_phone=rvcard[m][3];}}}} for(var i=0;i<domainList.length;i++){var currentDomain=domainList[i]; var tld=currentDomain.split('.').pop().toLowerCase(); var verisignUrl='https://rdap.verisign.com/'+tld+'/v1/domain/'+currentDomain.toUpperCase(); try{var r=await fetch(verisignUrl,{headers:{'Accept':'application/rdap+json, application/json'}}); var raw=await r.json(); var result={}; result.domain_name=raw.ldhName||currentDomain; var events=raw.events||[]; for(var e=0;e<events.length;e++){if(events[e].eventAction==='registration')result.created_date=events[e].eventDate;if(events[e].eventAction==='expiration'||events[e].eventAction==='registrar expiration')result.expiry_date=events[e].eventDate;if(events[e].eventAction==='last changed')result.updated_date=events[e].eventDate;if(events[e].eventAction==='last update of RDAP database')result.rdap_updated=events[e].eventDate;} await extractEntityData(raw.entities||[],result); result.status=raw.status||[]; result.nameservers=(raw.nameservers||[]).map(function(ns){return ns.ldhName;}); result.dnssec=raw.secureDNS?raw.secureDNS.delegationSigned:null; var links=raw.links||[]; for(var l=0;l<links.length;l++){var link=links[l]; if(link.rel==='related'&&link.href){try{var relatedResp=await fetch(link.href,{headers:{'Accept':'application/rdap+json, application/json'}}); if(relatedResp.ok){var relatedData=await relatedResp.json(); await extractEntityData(relatedData.entities||[],result); if(!result.registrant_name&&relatedData.entities){for(var re=0;re<relatedData.entities.length;re++){var rent=relatedData.entities[re];if(rent.roles&&rent.roles.indexOf('registrant')!==-1){var rvcard=rent.vcardArray&&rent.vcardArray[1]?rent.vcardArray[1]:[]; for(var rv=0;rv<rvcard.length;rv++){if(rvcard[rv][0]==='fn'&&!result.registrant_name)result.registrant_name=rvcard[rv][3];}}}}}}catch(linkErr){console.log('Related link fetch failed:',linkErr.message);}}} allResults.push(result);}catch(err){allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,error:err.message});}} return JSON.stringify({total_domains:domainList.length,results:allResults});
